name: typedef_array_of_typedef_logic
description: Code should include a typedef array where the element type is itself a typedef of logic. This pattern triggers recursive typedef resolution during AST cloning, which can cause memory leaks in Yosys when the wiretype attribute is not properly cleaned before assignment.
snippet: typedef logic T; typedef T [3:0] S;

name: typedef_chaining_with_array_dimensions
description: Code should include a typedef chain where an intermediate typedef is used as an array type. The pattern requires at least two typedef declarations in sequence where the second uses the first as an array element type, triggering deep clone operations during type resolution.
snippet: typedef T1 T2; typedef T2 [N:0] T3;
